title: UACP Sync Event
description: Signed, ordered event envelope for append-only context sync. Defines the wire unit exchanged between devices and the relay. This is the uacp-sync-event OPTIONAL extension (v0.1.0).

conversation_id.description: Identifies the conversation this event belongs to.

parent_event_id.description: Parent event in the partial order. null ONLY for the first event in a conversation.

vector_clock.description: Logical clock keyed by device UUID. author_device_id MUST be present and strictly greater than its value in the parent event.

author_user_id.description: Identity of the user who authored this event.

author_device_id.description: Device that produced and signed this event. MUST be a key in vector_clock.

timestamp.description: Monotonic milliseconds since Unix epoch on the author device.

scope_id.description: Scope that governs which member keys can decrypt the payload.

payload.description: AES-256-GCM ciphertext, base64url-encoded (no padding). See encryption-envelope spec.

signature.description: Ed25519 signature (64 bytes, base64url-encoded without padding) over the canonical CBOR of all fields except signature itself.

uuid_v4.description: RFC 4122 v4 UUID, lowercase hex with hyphens.
